name: container-skill-loadout
title: Container skill materialization (loadout → ~/.claude/skills)
description: Resident-agent containers do not materialize each agent's yaml skills: into ~/.claude/skills, so civic skills (send-goal/receive-goal) and future skills are present-but-not-auto-discoverable live (agent_loop only --append-system-prompt the charter). 06-29 agent-handbook Tier-B e2e worked because the Hub _work_ime embeds the report command, but skills' description-triggering needs materialization. Scope: in agent_startup.sh / agent_loop, copy the agent's skills into ~/.claude/skills (respect per-role loadout: CEO=send-goal, departments=receive-goal). Relates to deferred 'full loadout materialize' + AC7 cross-rm persistence in resident-agent-contracts.md.
creator: weston
